scenarios.title: Perfect Identity Match
scenarios.narrative: Exact same position should produce the strongest possible similarity score.

scenarios.title: Near-Identity, Different State Bits
scenarios.narrative: Piece placement is the same, but side-to-move and castling/en-passant state change the vector.

scenarios.title: Eval-Sensitive Tactical Difference
scenarios.narrative: These two boards are structurally close, but curated eval annotations drive a clear score drop when the eval feature is enabled.

scenarios.title: Material-Sensitive Difference
scenarios.narrative: Severe material collapse yields a low score and near-zero material contribution.

scenarios.title: Piece-Info Sensitivity (King/Mobility)
scenarios.narrative: King placement and mobility-driven features explain score differences beyond raw piece occupancy.

scenarios.title: Profile-Based Ranking Shift
scenarios.narrative: The top-ranked candidate flips between Profile A and Profiles B/C, illustrating feature-driven retrieval behavior.
